jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Nykaa - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!
